zh.lifeSummary: 當Bonacossa Borri於1254年出生在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾時，她的父親Captain Squarcino Borri19歲，母親Antonia de Borri18歲。她於1269年8月與Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1321年1月13日在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾享年67歲，埋葬在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bonacossa Borri于1254年出生在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾时，她的父亲Captain Squarcino Borri19岁，母亲Antonia de Borri18岁。她于1269年8月与Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1321年1月13日在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾享年67岁，埋葬在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾。

nameMeanings.name: Borri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Erna, Hans.
Swiss German: from a pet form of the personal name Burkhard (see Burkhart ).
Albanian: nickname from burrë (definite form burri) ‘man’, figuratively ‘brave man’, ‘man of his word’, and ‘distinguished person’.

variants.name: Burkhart
meanings: German: from the medieval personal name Burkhard, from ancient Germanic Burghard, composed of the elements burg ‘fort, castle’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This form of the surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and in Czechia (compare 2 below), but it is very rare there. Compare also Borgardt , Brookhart , Burgert , Burghart , Burkart , and Burkett .
Germanized form of Polish and Czech Burkert , Czech Purkert or Purkart, and Slovenian Purkart: from a German variant and Slavicized forms of the medieval German personal name Burkhard (see 1 above).

variants.name: Burry
meanings: English (southern): nickname from Middle English burry ‘rough, shaggy’.
English: alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) borough enclosure’, Middle English bur(g)h + hei(e), hai(e) (Old English burg ‘borough’+ (ge)hæg ‘enclosure’).
Swiss German: variant of Burri and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this or of the variant Buri . The surname Burry is very rare in Switzerland.

en.lifeSummary: When Bonacossa Borri was born in 1254, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy, her father, Captain Squarcino Borri, was 19 and her mother, Antonia de Borri, was 18. She married Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano in August 1269, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 13 January 1321, in Milan, Lombardy, Italy, at the age of 67, and was buried in Milan, Lombardy, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bonacossa Borri est née en 1254, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie, son père, Captain Squarcino Borri, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Antonia de Borri, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano en août 1269, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 janvier 1321, à Milano, Lombardia, Italie, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Milano, Lombardia, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bonacossa Borri 1254 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Captain Squarcino Borri 19 und ihre Mutter Antonia de Borri 18. Sie hat im August 1269 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Januar 1321 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Milano, Lombardei, Italien und wurde in Milano, Lombardei, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bonacossa Borri è nata il nel 1254 nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, sua padre, Captain Squarcino Borri, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Antonia de Borri, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano nel agosto 1269, nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 13 gennaio 1321, nel Milano, Lombardia, Italia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Milano, Lombardia, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bonacossa Borriが1254年にイタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノで生まれた時，父Captain Squarcino Borriは19歳，母Antonia de Borriは18歳であった。1269年8月にイタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノでMatteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milanoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1321年1月13日にイタリアロンバーディアミラノで67歳で死去し，イタリアロンバーディアミラノにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bonacossa Borri(이)가 1254년 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Captain Squarcino Borri(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Antonia de Borri(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1269년 8월 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1321년 1월 13일 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bonacossa Borri nasceu em 1254, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália, seu pai, Captain Squarcino Borri, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Antonia de Borri, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano em agosto de 1269, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1321, em Milano, Lombardia, Itália, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Milano, Lombardia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bonacossa Borri родилась в 1254 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия, её отцу по имени Captain Squarcino Borri было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Antonia de Borri, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano август 1269 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 13 января 1321 г. в местности милано, ломбардя, Италия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности милано, ломбардя, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bonacossa Borri nació en 1254, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, su papá, Captain Squarcino Borri, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Antonia de Borri, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano en agosto de 1269, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 13 de enero de 1321, en Milano, Lombardia, Italia, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Milano, Lombardia, Italia.
